name: station-walls
description: Station walls, conduits, bulkhead door, and interior details

commands.code: AFRAME.registerComponent("station-walls",{init(){const g=this.el.object3D;const wallMat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0x0d1117,roughness:0.6,metalness:0.8});const panelMat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0x141a22,roughness:0.5,metalness:0.7});const accentMat=new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0x00ffaa,transparent:true,opacity:0.15});const blueMat=new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0x0066ff,transparent:true,opacity:0.2});const warnMat=new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0xff8800,transparent:true,opacity:0.12});/* Left wall */var lw=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.04,2.8,2.6),wallMat);lw.position.set(-1.95,1.4,-0.5);g.add(lw);/* Right wall */var rw=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.04,2.8,2.6),wallMat);rw.position.set(1.95,1.4,-0.5);g.add(rw);/* Back wall */var bw=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(3.94,2.8,0.04),wallMat);bw.position.set(0,1.4,-1.82);g.add(bw);/* Wall panel insets - left */for(var i=0;i<3;i++){var p=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.01,0.6,0.7),panelMat);p.position.set(-1.92,1.0+i*0.75,-0.5+i*0.3-0.3);g.add(p);var trim=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.015,0.62,0.02),accentMat);trim.position.set(-1.91,1.0+i*0.75,-0.5+i*0.3-0.3-0.35);g.add(trim);}/* Wall panel insets - right */for(var i=0;i<3;i++){var p=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.01,0.6,0.7),panelMat);p.position.set(1.92,1.0+i*0.75,-0.5-i*0.3+0.3);g.add(p);var trim=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.015,0.62,0.02),accentMat);trim.position.set(1.91,1.0+i*0.75,-0.5-i*0.3+0.3+0.35);g.add(trim);}/* Horizontal conduit runs along walls */var condMat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0x1a2030,roughness:0.3,metalness:0.9});for(var s=-1;s<=1;s+=2){var conduit=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.025,0.025,2.6,8),condMat);conduit.rotation.x=Math.PI/2;conduit.position.set(s*1.88,2.4,-0.5);g.add(conduit);var conduit2=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.018,0.018,2.6,8),condMat);conduit2.rotation.x=Math.PI/2;conduit2.position.set(s*1.88,2.2,-0.5);g.add(conduit2);}/* Bulkhead door frame - back wall */var frameMat=new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({color:0x1a1f28,roughness:0.3,metalness:0.9});var doorL=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.08,2.2,0.08),frameMat);doorL.position.set(-0.45,1.1,-1.78);g.add(doorL);var doorR=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.08,2.2,0.08),frameMat);doorR.position.set(0.45,1.1,-1.78);g.add(doorR);var doorTop=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.98,0.08,0.08),frameMat);doorTop.position.set(0,2.22,-1.78);g.add(doorTop);/* Door accent lights */var doorGlowL=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.02,2.0,0.02),new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0xff4400,transparent:true,opacity:0.4}));doorGlowL.position.set(-0.5,1.1,-1.76);g.add(doorGlowL);var doorGlowR=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.02,2.0,0.02),new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:0xff4400,transparent:true,opacity:0.4}));doorGlowR.position.set(0.5,1.1,-1.76);g.add(doorGlowR);/* AIRLOCK text above door *//* Floor hazard stripes near walls */for(var s=-1;s<=1;s+=2){for(var i=0;i<6;i++){var stripe=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.08,0.004,0.3),warnMat);stripe.position.set(s*1.7,0.015,-1.4+i*0.45);g.add(stripe);}}/* Equipment boxes on right wall */for(var i=0;i<2;i++){var box=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.15,0.25,0.2),panelMat);box.position.set(1.87,0.6+i*0.5,0.2);g.add(box);var led=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.005,0.02,0.02),new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({color:i===0?0x00ff00:0x0088ff}));led.position.set(1.94,0.65+i*0.5,0.25);g.add(led);}/* Vent grate on left wall */for(var i=0;i<5;i++){var slat=new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.01,0.02,0.25),panelMat);slat.position.set(-1.92,0.5+i*0.04,0.3);g.add(slat);}this._meshes=g.children.slice();}});var el=document.createElement("a-entity");el.setAttribute("station-walls","");document.querySelector("a-scene").appendChild(el);console.log("[hot-swap] station-walls injected");
